Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award; Request For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DON A. LESSER'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Rainer Klammer (650.679.0289) respondent and opposing party appearing in propria persona
No other appearances on this matter. Respondent did not comply with Local Rule 8.3(D). The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Grant, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit proposed forms of order and judgment. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
